TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == siwkay ni Charles Barkley == ci Charles Barkley nalecuh i Leeds, Alabama, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Charles Barkley i 1984 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 5, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. ci Charles Barkley nalecuhan i 2 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1963 a mihca. ci Charles Barkley, miunduay.
S.PHON: == siwkaj ni ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs barkr~…æ…ô == ¶i ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs barkr~…æ…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i r~…æ…ô…ôds, ar~…æabama, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs barkr~…æ…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu pƒßir~…æad…ôr~…æpƒßia **…ôrs putiput. ¶i ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs barkr~…æ…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a. ¶i ¶ƒßarr~…æ…ôs barkr~…æ…ô, miunduaj.

Charles Barkley i 1984 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 5, namapili' tu nu Philadelphia 76ers putiput. ci Charles Barkley nalecuhan i 2 a bulad 20 a demiad, 1963 a mihca. ci Charles Barkley, miunduay.
